headline: Senior Backend Software Engineer at Ridgeline Cloud | Go, Python, Distributed Systems
location: Salt Lake City, Utah, United States
summary: Senior backend individual contributor with 19 years of software engineering experience. Currently at Ridgeline Cloud building distributed systems in Go and Python. Previously spent six years as a backend engineer at a Salt Lake fintech firm and roughly ten years across two infrastructure-focused employers before that. Not on the management track. Off the clock: Wasatch touring, volunteer board work with a Wasatch trail nonprofit, and two kids who are much better on skis than I am.
